session.closed: session closed. type /tp login to sign in again.
onboarding.setup: Let's set up your profile quickly.
onboarding.step1_title: Step 1 of 3 — What are you looking for in TermPals?
onboarding.step1_prompt: Type the number of your choice and press Enter:
onboarding.step2_title: Step 2 of 3 — Tell us about yourself (max 280 chars)
onboarding.step2_hint: This is the first thing people will see when you match.
onboarding.step2_skip: Type /tp skip to fill it in later with /tp profile edit.
onboarding.step3_desc: TermPals can read your current project's README.md and share it with people you match with.
onboarding.step3_opt1: 1. Yes, share my README with my matches
onboarding.step3_opt2: 2. No, only share my tech stack (no README)
onboarding.step3_prompt: Type the number of your choice and press Enter:
onboarding.saved: ✓ profile set up. Welcome to TermPals.
onboarding.search_hint: Type /tp search to find your first match.
search.no_match: No developers available right now. Try again later.
search.limit_reached: you've used all 4 searches for today. They reset in 24h.
search.active_conv: you already have an active conversation. Use /tp leave to exit.
search.match_diff_category: (this match isn't your exact category, but is open to both)
search.match_any_category: (no matches in your category right now, this one is from another)
connect.no_match: no active match. use /tp search first.
connect.active_conv: you already have an active conversation. use /tp leave first.
leave.no_conv: You don't have an active conversation.
friends.title: ── your friends ──────────────────────
friends.invite_hint: use /tp invite @username to start a chat
friends.empty: no friends yet. use /tp search to meet devs.
status.title: ── current status ────────────────────
status.readme_toggle: /tp readme toggle → change your README visibility
profile.edit_hint: /tp profile edit → write your bio and press Enter:
profile.bio_prompt: write your bio and press Enter:
profile.bio_too_long: bio can't exceed 280 characters. Try again:
pro.title: We're considering launching TermPals Pro:
pro.question: Would you pay for this?
pro.opt2: 2. No, I prefer the free version
pro.interested: ✓ great, we'll let you know when it's available.
pro.not_interested: ✓ thanks for your honesty, we'll keep it in mind.
pro.skipped: ok, sticking with the free version. you can answer later with /tp search.
pro.free_reminder: in the meantime, you can keep using TermPals for free,
feedback.bug_success: ✓ thanks for reporting it, we'll look into it.
feedback.suggestion_success: ✓ thanks for the idea, we'll keep it in mind.
readme.no_match: you don't have an active conversation.
readme.no_match_conv: You don't have an active conversation.
readme.not_shared: this user doesn't share their README.
readme.no_readme_conv: The match has no README available.
readme.public: ✓ your README is now public for your matches.
readme.no_project: no project detected yet. use /tp search or reopen your workspace.
delete.confirm_prompt: are you sure? type CONFIRMAR to delete your account and all data, or anything else to cancel.
delete.confirm_full:
are you sure you want to delete your account?

  this will delete all your TermPals data:
  conversations, matches, friends and profile.

  type  CONFIRMAR  to continue
  or anything else to cancel
delete.success: ✓ account and data deleted. thanks for using TermPals.
delete.cancelled: cancelled. your account is still active.
logout.success: session closed. type /tp login to sign in again.
add.proposed_waiting: friend request sent to @{0}. waiting for them to also type /tp add.
add.confirmed: ✓ you and @{0} are now friends on TermPals.
add.confirmed_stay: you can keep talking or type /tp leave to close the conversation.
add.no_conv: you don't have an active conversation.
invite.not_friend: @{0} is not in your friends list.
invite.friend_wants: @{0} wants to start a conversation with you.
stack.title: you             match
stack.no_project: Missing project info to compare stacks.
error.no_session: you need to log in first. type /tp login.
error.unknown_command: unknown command. type /tp help to see available commands.
error.pro_invalid: type 1, 2, or /tp skip to answer later.
error.network: no connection. check your internet and try again.
help.title: TermPals commands:
help.connect: /tp connect             Send invitation to current match
help.friends: /tp friends             List your friends with their stack
help.invite: /tp invite <user>       Invite a friend to chat
help.add: /tp add                 Propose friendship in current conversation
help.status: /tp status              Show your status, workspace and session
help.stack: /tp stack               Compare your stack with your match
help.readme: /tp readme              Show match's README in active conversation
help.delete: /tp delete              Delete your account and all data
consent.intro1: > before continuing, we need your authorization.
consent.intro2: > we comply with the GDPR (EU General Data Protection Regulation).
consent.data2: ✓ real name and location (only if public on GitHub)
consent.data3: ✓ GitHub email (not shown to other users)
consent.data4: ✓ tech stack from your current VS Code workspace
consent.data5: ✓ project README (only if you authorize it)
consent.usage1: → to find compatible matches by stack
consent.usage2: → to show your profile to other TermPals users
consent.usage3: → chat messages are NOT stored, deleted when closed
consent.usage4: → we never sell or share your data with third parties
consent.rights1: → access: view your data with /tp status
consent.rights2: → rectification: edit your bio with /tp profile edit
consent.rights3: → erasure: delete your account with /tp delete
consent.btn_accept: [1] I accept and want to continue
consent.footer: > if you don't accept, you can close this window without registering any data.
chat.no_more_messages: you can no longer send messages.
chat.friends_confirmed: ✓ you and @{0} are now friends on TermPals.
chat.friends_now: you can keep talking or type /tp leave to close.
search.compat_no_workspace: ⚠ open a project in VS Code to calculate real compatibility
stack.no_workspace: to see compatibility you need an open project in VS Code.
stack.no_project_theirs: your match doesn't have a detected project yet.
readme.empty: this user has no README in their current project.
